query: SELECT major_name, COUNT(*) as count FROM professors WHERE university_name = 'University of Washington' GROUP BY major_name LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT major_name, COUNT(*) as count FROM professors WHERE university_name = 'University of Washington' GROUP BY major_name LIMIT 20;
